item.text:
[demo/rate_limiter.py](/private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-uglee-Coding-ralphton-research/16c236c5-e508-4436-9d28-e8588d7300ac/scratchpad/omb-grid-nohook/demo/rate_limiter.py:15) already has the pruning logic:

```python
self.calls = [t for t in self.calls if now - t < self.window]
```

I verified it with a quick script: calls returned `True, True, False`, then after the window elapsed the next call returned `True` and `len(rl.calls)` dropped from `2` to `1`. No edit was needed.
